mapper.select: SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, NAME, EMAIL, PHONE_NUMBER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM CUSTOMERS ORDER BY CUSTOMER_ID DESC
SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, NAME, EMAIL, PHONE_NUMBER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM CUSTOMERS WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{id}
SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, NAME, EMAIL, PHONE_NUMBER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM CUSTOMERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}

SELECT CUSTOMER_ID, NAME, EMAIL, PHONE_NUMBER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT FROM CUSTOMERS
AND LOWER(NAME) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{name}) || '%'
AND LOWER(EMAIL) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{email}) || '%'
ORDER BY CUSTOMER_ID DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT IDENTITY_VAL_LOCAL() FROM SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1
INSERT INTO CUSTOMERS ( NAME, EMAIL, PHONE_NUMBER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{email}, #{phoneNumber}, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, CURRENT TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO CUSTOMERS AS T USING ( SELECT CAST(#{name} AS VARCHAR(100)) AS NAME, CAST(#{email} AS VARCHAR(200)) AS EMAIL, CAST(#{phoneNumber} AS VARCHAR(30)) AS PHONE_NUMBER FROM SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1 ) AS S ON T.EMAIL = S.EMAIL WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.NAME = S.NAME, T.PHONE_NUMBER = S.PHONE_NUMBER, T.UPDATED_AT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( NAME, EMAIL, PHONE_NUMBER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( S.NAME, S.EMAIL, S.PHONE_NUMBER, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, CURRENT TIMESTAMP )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CUSTOMERS ( NAME, EMAIL, PHONE_NUMBER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) SELECT NAME, #{newEmail}, PHONE_NUMBER, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, CURRENT TIMESTAMP FROM CUSTOMERS WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{sourceCustomerId}

INSERT INTO CUSTOMER_STAGING ( NAME, EMAIL, PHONE_NUMBER, STATUS, CREATED_AT )
SELECT #{customer.name}, #{customer.email}, #{customer.phoneNumber}, #{status}, CURRENT TIMESTAMP FROM SYSIBM.SYSDUMMY1

INSERT INTO CUSTOMERS ( NAME, EMAIL, PHONE_NUMBER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) SELECT S.NAME, S.EMAIL, S.PHONE_NUMBER, CURRENT TIMESTAMP, CURRENT TIMESTAMP FROM CUSTOMER_STAGING S WHERE S.STATUS = #{status} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CUSTOMERS C WHERE C.EMAIL = S.EMAIL )
mapper.update: UPDATE CUSTOMERS SET NAME = #{name}, EMAIL = #{email}, PHONE_NUMBER = #{phoneNumber}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT TIMESTAMP WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{id}
